description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted with a realistic human form and proportions. The figure is dressed in a collared shirt with a visible tie, suggesting a formal or business-casual attire. The head is sculpted with defined facial features and short, neatly styled hair. The arms are positioned close to the body, and the overall stance is upright, indicating a neutral, standing posture. The clothing appears to be fitted, with no visible accessories or carried items. The shoes are simple and appropriate for urban walking, completing the look of a typical city pedestrian.
description: A standing adult figure in formal attire with a collared shirt and tie, short hair, and simple shoes, posed in a neutral upright stance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, collared shirt, and tie, with arms close to the body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head, the shirt's sleeve, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head, shoulders, and the overall silhouette of the figure.
description_view_3: Oblique view emphasizing the side of the torso, arm, and the fitted nature of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: collared shirt with tie and formal trousers
